sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77368" key="panepi/klopos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰν-επίκλοπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n77368.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">all-treacherous</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
